beefs.title: Citizen Vigilante
beefs.about: Rescuing orphaned refs ("fs" from rev 1363904593)
quotes: restored one commercial detail that was reliably sourced to here, and retitled brief subsection

Removed claims about it being number 1 on streaming. See talk for a discussion. Dated sources placed it at number 1, but it seems not to have been even in the top ten for very long so this seems like UNDUE weight. It's true we can't say "briefly" without OR, but nothing requires us to cover aspects of its release if dated sources are objectively misleading WP:NOTNEWS
